creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
Created attachment 243460
kafka-connect-elasticsearch.patch

New port net/kafka-connect-elasticsearch

The Elasticsearch connector by Confluent allows moving data from Apache Kafka to Elasticsearch 7.x, and 8.x. It writes data from a topic in Kafka to an index in Elasticsearch and all data for a topic have the same type.

Sources: https://github.com/confluentinc/kafka-connect-elasticsearch
